use_cases: Display loading states during async operations like API calls or data fetching
Indicate page transitions or navigation loading in single-page applications
Show progress during file uploads or form submissions
Provide visual feedback during background processing tasks
Enhance user experience by indicating system activity without blocking interaction
ai_summary: An infinity symbol SVG loader with a continuous stroke animation that creates a traveling dash effect. The component is fully self-contained with inline keyframes, accessible with proper ARIA attributes, and scales responsively via the size prop. It uses theme-aware colors (stroke-muted for track, primary for animated path) making it suitable for any design system.
